info.name: Full Laravel API (Enhanced)
info.description:
🔥 Professional Laravel REST API - merged Auth + Tables. Generated on 2025-10-18T15:35:22.918475Z

Includes Auth, Users, Profiles, Posts, Comments, Replies, Reactions, Reaction Types, and Post Statuses.
Created for Mustafa ElSayed Muhammed.

item.description: Authentication and session management (register, login, email verification, password reset, profile endpoints).
